chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2075 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 11230/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 11231/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 11.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Khalique Nawal, Advocate a/w Applicant ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicant Altaf Hussain Khoso son of Muhammad Bux Khoso, is present along with his Counsel to seek protective bail to enable him to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 151/2025 of PS FIA A.H.T. Circle, Karachi, under Section 17/22 of Emigration Ordinance, 1979, (Amendment March 2022) r/w Section 420, 468, 471, 109 PPC and police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicant to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, above named applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 07 days from today or the date on which the applicant will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
